steps.title: Find the total for the remaining resistors
steps.content: The total resistance is $132$ ohms, and three of the eight resistors have a total resistance of $84$ ohms. Therefore, the other five resistors have total resistance $132-84=48$ ohms.

steps.title: Bound one positive resistor
steps.content: Let one of those five resistors have resistance $c$. Since all five remaining resistances are positive and have sum $48$, $c$ must be greater than $0$ and less than $48$: $$0\lt c\lt 48.$$

steps.title: Choose the exact interval
steps.content: The interval $0\lt c\lt 12$ is too narrow because $c$ could be, for example, $36$ while the other four positive resistors sum to $12$. The exact set of possible values is $0\lt c\lt 48$, so B is correct.
